ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>Maintains persona and context relevance, natural dialogue flow despite the complex situation; slightly less overall quality due to direct contradiction of safety policy.
baseline_no_context<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Follows persona and context relevance, but lacks naturalness in dialogue; maintains overall quality with a firm stance on security.
